queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS agg_group_count,
       SUM(CAST(group_rows AS BIGINT)) AS sum_group_rows,
       SUM(sum_o_custkey) AS sum_o_custkey,
       COUNT(o_orderkey) AS count_o_orderkey,
       COUNT(orders_replica_id) AS count_orders_replica_id,
       COUNT(o_orderstatus) AS count_o_orderstatus,
       COUNT(o_orderpriority) AS count_o_orderpriority,
       COUNT(o_clerk) AS count_o_clerk,
       COUNT(o_shippriority) AS count_o_shippriority
FROM (
  SELECT o_orderkey,
         orders_replica_id,
         o_orderstatus,
         o_orderpriority,
         o_clerk,
         o_shippriority,
         COUNT(*) AS group_rows,
         SUM(CAST(o_custkey AS BIGINT)) AS sum_o_custkey
  FROM scale.orders_scale_01
  GROUP BY o_orderkey,
           orders_replica_id,
           o_orderstatus,
           o_orderpriority,
           o_clerk,
           o_shippriority
) grouped_orders

theorem.description: Aggregation scale test with grouped orders scaled to 1x
theorem.name: EE-AGG-SCALE-01
